title: Database Disk Image Malformed
symptoms: Error: database disk image is malformed in UI
root_cause: Incomplete writes during crash, corrupted WAL files
resolution_steps: 1. Stop services 2. Backup corrupted file 3. Remove WAL files 4. Run .recover 5. Verify and replace
prevention: Enable automated backups, don't force-kill processes

title: Dashboard Shows 1 Day Old Data
description: Dashboard freshness indicator showing stale data
symptoms: Data shows as 1 day old despite live data available
root_cause: get_data_freshness only checking eod_ohlcv table, not regular_market_current
resolution_steps: Updated get_data_freshness to check multiple tables: eod_ohlcv, regular_market_current, psx_indices
prevention: Check multiple data sources for freshness
